location.label: Region
location.toolTip: Azure region for the EventHub and Vector container. Resource logs can only be forwarded from resources in this same region. Metrics and activity logs are collected across all regions regardless.

basics.name: servicePrincipalObjectId
basics.label: Service Principal Object ID
basics.toolTip: The object ID of the Better Stack service principal in your tenant. This is provided by Better Stack after you grant admin consent.

basics.name: betterStackSourceId
basics.label: Better Stack Source ID
basics.toolTip: Your Better Stack source ID (e.g. s12345). Found in your Better Stack dashboard.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid source ID (e.g. s12345).

basics.name: betterStackSourceToken
basics.toolTip: Your Better Stack source token for log ingestion. Found in your Better Stack dashboard.

elements.name: resourceGroupName
elements.label: Resource Group Name
elements.toolTip: A new resource group will be created with this name to hold the EventHub and Vector container.

constraints.validationMessage: Resource group name must be 1-90 characters and can contain alphanumerics, underscores, parentheses, hyphens, and periods.

elements.name: eventHubName
elements.label: Event Hub Name
elements.toolTip: Name of the Event Hub that will receive Azure logs.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 1-50 characters, starting with a letter or number.

elements.name: betterStackIngestingHost
elements.label: Ingesting Host
elements.toolTip: Better Stack log ingestion endpoint. Only change this if instructed by Better Stack support.

elements.name: returnUrl
elements.label: Return URL
elements.toolTip: URL to return to after deployment completes. Pre-filled by Better Stack.
